items.claim: Anna Melissano has poor striking defense.
items.quote: she was, you know, blocking punches with her face. I mean, she had that like Priscilla Catchawera striking defense.

items.claim: Anna Melissano has a weak ground game.
items.quote: the ground game from what I've seen, it looks awful.

items.claim: Diani Barbosa has improved her cardio in recent fights.
items.quote: I thought the one knock on her was, you know, the cardio, but her cardio's looked a lot better these last couple fights

items.claim: Diani Barbosa is a physically strong black belt in BJJ.
items.quote: she's a legit black belt in BJJ. Very physically strong.

items.claim: Suck Hung has a suspect chin.
items.quote: you look on his regional scene and you see, oh, he's been knocked out twice. uh maybe he's a little bit chinny

items.claim: Jean Paul Laboseani is a high-level BJJ practitioner who excels off his back.
items.quote: he's a legit black belt in BJJ. He's extremely slick on the mat. And Labosiani is one of these guys who will like very rarely wrestle, but he's kind of hoping you take him down and once you take him down, he's going to look to sub you.
